steps.title: Find the relative-clause subject
steps.content: In "a document that ______ the basic freedoms," the word "that" refers to the singular noun "document." The verb in the blank must agree with that singular subject.

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B are plural verb forms, so they disagree with the singular subject. Choice D is the base plural form in this context. The singular present-tense verb correctly agrees with "that" referring to one document. The answer is C.
